title: microcitrus garrawayae
intro: Microcitrus garrawayae, also known as the Australian round lime, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the subtropical rainforests of eastern Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Microcitrus garrawayae include antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, as well as the ability to support cardiovascular health and immune function. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these preparations.
